ocr_findings.description: The top of the page begins mid-sentence ('やクレジットカード、社員証、電子マネーなどです。') which is a continuation from the previous page — correctly captured. The ICタグとICカード diagram and the RFIDとNFCの関係図 nested diagram are replaced by image placeholder references (img-0.jpeg, img-1.jpeg). The diagrams contain labeled boxes (TypeA/TypeB/FeliCa, taspo/運転免許証/パスポート/交通系ICカード) that are present in the image but absent from OCR text. Low severity as these are visual diagrams with embedded labels, and the surrounding prose explains the same content.

reviewer_notes: Page covers ICタグ/ICカード comparison and the RFIDとNFC section including the nested relationship diagram. All prose text is faithfully reproduced. The two embedded diagrams (ICタグとICカード illustration, RFIDとNFCの関係図 box diagram) are rendered as image placeholders — the diagram label text (TypeA, TypeB, FeliCa, specific device examples) is lost, but the surrounding explanatory text covers the same information. Overall OCR quality is good.
